text.title: Security Testing Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: SaaS release 2026-05-25 security pass
example.note: sast_tools=[semgrep, bandit, gosec]; dep_audit sources=[osv.dev, pip-audit, npm-audit] transitive=true; dast authenticated=true target=staging; secrets_scan pre_commit=true CI=true; asvs_coverage L1 90%; fix_windows critical=24h high=7d medium=30d. SAST PR gate caught one SQL injection at write time; osv-scanner flagged a transitive CVE that direct audit missed; ZAP authenticated context found IDOR on /api/orders/{id}.

example.title: Pre-launch surprise audit
example.note: Quarterly SAST + direct-only deps + unauth ZAP + CI-only gitleaks; external pentest found 14 highs and 3 criticals. Tree caught all: sast-on-pr, dep-audit-with-transitive, dast-authenticated, secrets-pre-commit. Each was a single-rule fix.
